checks.describe: core-internals profile is up: kind context kind-kubeadv-core answers and the real worker node exists (CLUSTER KEPT — M6 continues on it)
the Website CRD is installed and Established (the API server serves the kubeadv.io/v1alpha1 Website kind)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core get crd websites.kubeadv.io -o jsonpath='established={.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Established")].status}'; echo

checks.describe: the custom kind is a first-class API resource: discovery lists websites in the kubeadv.io group
the CRD's CEL rule rejects a Website asking for more than 5 replicas at admission (self-seeded; the apply is expected to fail with the custom message)
the operator turns a Website into a running Deployment+Service and writes status Ready=True (self-seeded in m5-check2, reconciled by the running operator, then removed)
the operator stamps the child Deployment with a controller ownerReference to its Website and puts the cleanup finalizer on the Website (self-seeded in m5-check3, then removed)
